inputs_public_description.threshold_grid: Derived threshold-response grid; raw provider data not redistributed.
inputs_public_description.GSIM observed anchor: Derived GSIM basin-average panel and public GSIM metadata/characteristics; local paths removed.
inputs_public_description.GRDC observed anchor: Derived GRDC station-month response and station-point summaries; local paths removed.
inputs_public_description.GRDC polygon route: Partial local polygon support only; not used as closed basin-polygon route.

geometry_summary.note: GSIM join requires metadata.csv, catchment_characteristics.csv and per-basin shapefile presence.
GSIM panel already carries station coordinates for all final-family entities.
GRDC final-family point geometry comes from the reconstructed response panel latitude/longitude.
GRDC polygon coverage is limited to the available available polygon family; it does not close the full 1719-station support route.
